success_dom_required_text: Open next runbook action: Packet finalized

next_action_navigation.button: Open next runbook action: Packet finalized

states.success: Meeting Runbook rendered with ready, warning, and blocked lifecycle gates.

accessibility.keyboard: Runbook next-action button is reachable by role and remains usable with keyboard/focus-visible styling.
accessibility.focus: Existing focus-visible styling remains active for buttons and QA controls.
accessibility.contrast: Runbook uses existing navy, gold, green, and red status tokens with readable text on tinted cards.
accessibility.copy_review: Every runbook warning and blocked state gives a clerk action: promote agenda, finalize packet, attach notice proof, capture outcomes, adopt minutes, or publish the public record.
